jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at Manipal Hospitals
jsonLd.description:
Manipal Hospitals has an exciting opening for a Radiologist at our Gurgaon office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Manipal Hospitals:
Manipal Hospitals is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Manipal Hospitals!
